svg.text: Eight of the twelve third-placed teams advance. The contenders are level on points, so the
last seat comes down to goal difference, then goals scored. With games still to
play, the exact cut-off can only land between these two lines.
The 8th-best third: the last side to qualify. GD and GF are what separate teams now.
the easiest the bar can get
the hardest the bar can get
28 teams already through · 12 out · 8 still fighting for the seat · 6 games to play.
Also still alive for a third-place seat, currently sitting below third in their group: Austria (Group J), Uzbekistan (Group K).
Thirds ranked by points, then goal difference, then goals for.
PTS / GD / GF and LEFT are current values and games still to play; open-group rows are provisional.
THROUGH and OUT are mathematical certainties; ON THE BUBBLE means the seat is still live for that side.
The bounds above are exact: every result of the remaining games has been enumerated.
Method · exact enumeration of every scoreline of the group games still to play. Conduct held at current values.
